meaning: European Theatre of Operations(第二次世界大战时的)欧洲战区
examples: Commitment of football star Samuel Eto 'o to the fight against sleeping sickness and other NTDs.
Adebayor was identified in the process that led to City withdrawing interest in Barcelona's Samuel Eto 'o last week.
Samuel Eto 'o had Milan's defenders chasing shadows and the striker earned the penalty from which Diego Milito added Inter's second.
Prior to Eto'o, only Rabah Madjer had ever scored in a European Cup final.
Eto'o, scorer of 38 goals in all competitions last season, left for Inter Milan.
